use_cases: Displaying rich interactive content lists with animated 3D glass-like elements
Showcasing portfolio or gallery items with immersive visual transitions
Creating engaging data visualizations with morphing list items
Building premium SaaS dashboards with cinematic scroll effects
Designing immersive media experiences with particle and refraction effects
ai_summary: Lumina Interactive List is an advanced React component combining Three.js 3D rendering with GSAP animations to create a visually stunning interactive list with glassmorphism effects, chromatic aberration, liquid flow animations, and frost/ice visual treatments. Features auto-sliding, configurable distortion effects, and edge glow capabilities for immersive media and portfolio displays on SaaS and creative platforms.
